title: Business Idea Viability Quiz - Will Your Idea Succeed? | CrunchMilk
metaDescription: Evaluate your business idea's potential with this free 8-question quiz. Assess market demand, competition, funding needs, and your readiness to launch.
tagline: Is your business idea actually viable, or just a dream?

questions.question: Have you validated that real people would pay for your product or service?

options.text: No, it's just an idea I think is cool
Friends and family say it's a good idea
I've surveyed potential customers and gotten positive feedback
I've pre-sold or have paying customers/letters of intent

questions.question: How well do you understand your target market size?

options.text: I haven't researched the market at all
I have a general sense that it's a big market
I've researched TAM/SAM/SOM with industry data
I have specific, data-backed market sizing with a clear niche identified

questions.question: How does your idea differ from existing solutions in the market?

options.text: I'm not sure what competitors exist
There are competitors but I think I can do it better
I have a clear differentiator that matters to customers
I have a defensible competitive advantage (IP, unique access, network effects)

questions.question: Do you have the skills and experience to execute this idea?

options.text: This is a completely new field for me
I have some related skills but gaps in key areas
I have strong skills and have identified co-founders/hires for gaps
I have deep domain expertise and a team to cover all critical functions

questions.question: How much capital do you need to launch, and do you have access to it?

options.text: I need significant funding and have no access to capital
I need moderate funding and might bootstrap or borrow
I can start lean with personal savings or a small loan
I have capital secured or can launch with minimal investment

questions.question: How quickly can you generate revenue?

options.text: It would take years of development before any revenue
6-12 months before first revenue
1-6 months to first revenue
I can start generating revenue within weeks

questions.question: What's your personal financial runway if the business doesn't generate income right away?

options.text: I'd need income immediately - no savings
I could survive 1-3 months without income
I have 6-12 months of living expenses saved
12+ months of runway or I can keep my current job while launching

questions.question: How scalable is your business model?

options.text: It's limited by my personal time - I am the product
I could hire people but margins would be tight
There are clear ways to scale beyond just adding headcount
The model has strong unit economics and can scale with technology or systems

scoreRanges.label: Needs More Work
scoreRanges.analysis: Your idea needs more development before it's ready for launch. Focus on validating the market, understanding your competition, and building the skills or team you need. Don't quit your day job yet.

scoreRanges.label: Promising but Risky
scoreRanges.analysis: There's potential here, but significant risks remain. Before investing heavily, validate your idea with real customers, create a detailed financial plan, and build a minimum viable product to test the market.

scoreRanges.label: Strong Potential
scoreRanges.analysis: Your business idea has strong fundamentals. You've done your homework on the market and have the basics in place. Use a break-even calculator to plan your finances and set a clear launch timeline.

scoreRanges.label: Ready to Launch
scoreRanges.analysis: Your idea is well-validated with strong market potential, clear differentiation, and financial readiness. You're in an excellent position to launch. Execute with focus and keep iterating based on customer feedback.
